acceptedReplies: I can do {time}. Meet me at Café Hollow. Please do not bring anyone.
Alright. {time} works, but I cannot stay long.
I can move things around. Meet me at {time}.
refusedReplies: No. Ten is the only time I can safely do this.
I cannot make that time. Maybe tomorrow.
Not after dark. I am sorry.

acceptedReplies: Come to the station at {time}. Bring evidence, not theories.
refusedReplies: I do not arrange my investigation around you. Come during station hours.

acceptedReplies: Yeah, {time} is fine. Garage will be quieter then.
refusedReplies: Can't do it. Come by while the garage is open.

acceptedReplies: Before sunset. {time}. Do not knock loudly.
refusedReplies: Not after sunset. People who visit after dark are remembered.

acceptedReplies: {time}. Bring whatever you found. If it is real, I will make time.
refusedReplies: Not worth moving my deadline for. Send me something concrete first.

day.label: Busy café
day.text: Morning light follows you through Blackwood. Café Hollow is busy enough to feel safe, but every nearby table can hear more than Emily wants them to.

evening.label: Closing time
evening.text: The café is closing when you arrive. Chairs scrape across the floor and the conversation can finally become private. Outside, someone remains parked across the street.

night.label: After dark
night.text: Café Hollow is locked and dark. Emily waits beneath the rear security light, checking the lane each time a vehicle slows.

day.label: Neighbourhood awake
day.text: Curtains move as you approach Noah's house. In daylight, the street offers witnesses as well as protection.

evening.label: Family home
evening.text: Lights glow behind Noah's curtains. His family is home, tired and less patient with strangers.

night.label: Suspicious visit
night.text: The house is mostly dark. Visiting a missing teenager's home this late will be difficult to explain if anyone sees you.

day.label: Search conditions
day.text: Daylight reaches only partway beneath the pines. Search tape and footprints are easier to read before the shadows merge.

evening.label: Fading light
evening.text: The light is failing as you reach the forest edge. Details become harder to trust, and sounds carry farther between the trees.

night.label: High danger
night.text: At night the forest no longer resembles public land. Your torch reveals only fragments, while everything beyond the beam remains free to move.

day.label: Station hours
day.text: The station is open and crowded. Mason is busy, but your visit appears ordinary.

evening.label: Late shift
evening.text: Most desks are empty. Mason wants to know why this could not wait until morning.

night.label: After-hours report
night.text: A night officer records your name before allowing you through. Mason arrives already suspicious of the urgency.

day.label: Garage open
day.text: Tools, customers and ringing phones interrupt the conversation. Alex has witnesses around him.

evening.label: After closing
evening.text: The roller door is half lowered. With the customers gone, Alex has fewer reasons to avoid your questions.

night.label: Private workshop
night.text: One workshop light remains on. Meeting Alex here after dark feels less like an interview and more like entering his territory.

day.label: Curtains open
day.text: Mara can see you coming from across the street. Daylight makes her cautious rather than frightened.

evening.label: Before sunset
evening.text: Mara speaks through the locked flyscreen as the last daylight leaves the street.

night.label: Unwelcome caller
night.text: Mara does not open the door after dark. She watches you through a gap in the curtain and keeps one hand near the phone.

day.label: Newsroom active
day.text: The Gazette is busy. Anything you say could become a headline before sunset.

evening.label: Deadline pressure
evening.text: Sarah is working against a deadline. She will make time only if your information is useful.

night.label: Off-record meeting
night.text: The newsroom is dark except for Sarah's office. There are no witnesses to what either of you agrees to.

day.label: Visible road
day.text: Lake Road is exposed in daylight. Passing vehicles may witness the exchange, including whoever arranged it.

evening.label: Planned meeting
evening.text: The lake reflects the last light. It is late enough for privacy and early enough for someone to watch from a parked car.

night.label: Killer's advantage
night.text: There are no lights along Lake Road. Whoever invited you chose a place where distance and darkness erase witnesses.

day.label: Archives open
day.text: The library is open. Staff can help, but they may remember exactly what you searched for.

evening.label: Closing soon
evening.text: The librarian announces closing time while you search. You will need to decide what matters most.

night.label: Closed archive
night.text: The library is closed. A side window near the archive room does not appear to latch properly.

day.label: Day rest
day.text: Resting during daylight restores some strength, but the town continues without you.

evening.label: Quiet evening
evening.text: The house settles around you as the streetlights come on.

night.label: Sleep
night.text: You lock the doors and let the night simulation continue beyond the walls.
